syntheticDeclaration.purpose: SYNTHETIC TEST FIXTURE. Exercises the multilineage-cytopenia + blasts safety path so it cannot be quietly reduced to an isolated anemia differential. All CBC/symptom/exam values below are invented for schema and safety-test purposes only; no real patient, encounter, or laboratory result is described.

executionBinding.engineRationale: Multilineage cytopenia + blasts is expressible as a patient-input.schema.json CBC/smear input and evaluated by assessPediatricAnemia.

expectedBehavior.requiredSignal: Urgent/shared gate dominates ordinary ranking; unresolved scope exits remain visible.
forbiddenSignals: a ranked differential whose top entry is an isolated single-lineage diagnosis (e.g. iron-deficiency-anemia) rather than marrow-failure-infiltration
absence of an emergency-severity alert despite fever + neutropenia + thrombocytopenia + blasts on smear

expectedTrace.note: Verified by direct execution against assessPediatricAnemia on 2026-07-19 (see tests/dangerous-miss-scenarios.test.mjs). rankedDifferential[0].id is marrow-failure-infiltration at meets-defined-pattern; the multilineage cytopenia is not reduced to a single anemia pathway.

rollbackSignal: Re-verify by execution if modules/anemia/rules.json, candidates.json, or module.json digests change, or if ALERT-004/005/009 or MARROW-001/002/003 are edited or removed.
